2026-03-13TCFederal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board ActReappointment of the Chairperson of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment BoardReappointment of Edith Bramwell of Ottawa, Ontario, as Chairperson of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board, to hold office during good behavior for a term of five years, effective April 26, 2026.N/A
act: Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board Act
subject: Reappointment of the Chairperson of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board
precis: Reappointment of Edith Bramwell of Ottawa, Ontario, as Chairperson of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board, to hold office during good behavior for a term of five years, effective April 26, 2026.
